gates.description: Mean thoroughness-judge overall score across evaluated cases must be at least 70. A starting-point threshold, not a validated clinical floor.
The deterministic diagnosis-leak scanner must find zero leaked-diagnosis phrases in the historian's own turns, summed across evaluated cases.
The pipeline (Sonnet) final differential's top-3 must include a high-likelihood ground-truth diagnosis in at least 60% of evaluated cases. A starting-point threshold, not a validated clinical floor.

The independent (DeepSeek-R1) differential must share at least one top-3 diagnosis with the pipeline (Sonnet) differential in at least 50% of evaluated cases. A starting-point threshold, not a validated clinical floor.
